# Objective

Read raw datasets and process them for analysis.

# Preparation

```{r}
#| label: setup

#--- packages ---#
library(rio)
library(dplyr)
library(data.table)
library(here)
```

# Process datasets

```{r}
#| label: process-data

#--- read datasets ---#
flights <- import(here("data/raw/flights.csv"), setclass = "data.table")
weather <- import(here("data/raw/weather.csv"), setclass = "data.table")

#--- aggregate weather data from hourly to daily  ---#
weather_daily <-
  weather %>%
  .[, .(
    wind_speed = mean(wind_speed),
    temp = mean(temp),
    precip = mean(precip)
    ), by = .(month, day, origin)
  ]

#--- merge datasets ---#
reg_data <- merge(flights, weather_daily, by = c("month", "day", "origin"), all.x = TRUE)

#--- save the data ---#
saveRDS(reg_data, here("data/processed/reg_data.rds"))
```
